targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeInterval(TimeUnix) AS time, replaceOne(MetricName,'system.cpu.load_average.','') AS load, avg(Value) AS value FROM default.otel_metrics_gauge WHERE MetricName IN ('system.cpu.load_average.1m','system.cpu.load_average.5m','system.cpu.load_average.15m') AND $__timeFilter(TimeUnix) GROUP BY time, load ORDER BY time

SELECT $__timeInterval(TimeUnix) AS time, Attributes['state'] AS state, avg(Value) AS bytes FROM default.otel_metrics_sum WHERE MetricName='system.memory.usage' AND $__timeFilter(TimeUnix) GROUP BY time, state ORDER BY time

SELECT $__timeInterval(TimeUnix) AS time, concat(Attributes['device'],' ',Attributes['direction']) AS series, (max(Value)-min(Value)) / greatest(dateDiff('second', min(TimeUnix), max(TimeUnix)), 1) AS bps FROM default.otel_metrics_sum WHERE MetricName='system.disk.io' AND $__timeFilter(TimeUnix) GROUP BY time, series ORDER BY time

SELECT $__timeInterval(TimeUnix) AS time, concat(Attributes['device'],' ',Attributes['direction']) AS series, (max(Value)-min(Value)) / greatest(dateDiff('second', min(TimeUnix), max(TimeUnix)), 1) AS bps FROM default.otel_metrics_sum WHERE MetricName='system.network.io' AND $__timeFilter(TimeUnix) GROUP BY time, series ORDER BY time

SELECT $__timeInterval(TimeUnix) AS time, Attributes['mountpoint'] AS mount, avg(Value) AS used_bytes FROM default.otel_metrics_sum WHERE MetricName='system.filesystem.usage' AND Attributes['state']='used' AND $__timeFilter(TimeUnix) GROUP BY time, mount ORDER BY time
